title: Cyberpunk Rainy Street
summary: Moody Blade-Runner-inspired Tokyo street at night, neon reflections on wet pavement.
prompt: A moody cyberpunk Tokyo street at night, viewed from a low angle. Wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon signs in magenta, electric blue, and acid green. Tall skyscrapers vanish upward into mist. Holographic advertisements project above the street. A lone figure with a translucent umbrella walks away from the camera, silhouetted against the neon glow. Heavy atmospheric rain, cinematic film-still composition, Blade Runner mood, ultra-detailed.
